title: tigridia mortonii
intro: Tigridia mortonii, also known as the Mexican shellflower or tiger flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tigridia mortonii include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the roots and rhizomes, which can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to be consumed for medicinal purposes.
